name: fact-delta-substrate
title: spec-drift v2-A: fact-snapshot + fact-delta substrate (inventory@HEAD)
description: Deterministic code-fact snapshot at an arbitrary git source (working-tree or HEAD) + a pure fact-delta (symbol/import/call added/removed). The low-risk substrate beneath spec-drift v2-B coupling re-authoring; freezes the RawFileFacts schema before fact-cache slice2 optimizes it.
creator: oydodo
